description: Pre-check for content relevance using transcription lexical search before Pegasus analysis

search_config._comment_search_term: Can be a single string or array of alternatives. Examples: 'Product X' or ['Product X', 'Product-X', 'ProductX']
search_config._comment_pass_condition: Use 'found' to pass when terms ARE found (content relevance), or 'not_found' to pass when terms are NOT found (profanity check)

on_fail.description: The video does not mention {product_line} at any point in the transcription.
